title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 8 - 2017: Ancient Rome Backdrop Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle wakes up, comments on his computer overheating and feeling groggy, then excitedly responds to a viewer request for Ancient Rome green screen backdrops after only two videos. He describes the many historical backgrounds he can create — ancient Rome, Boulder Colorado in various years, ghost town mining towns, tribal walled cities — before rambling about video upload struggles with his neighbor's internet and his plan to organize his house so he can find his car papers and sell his car.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enthusiastic and willing to do any background viewers ask for
won't do them — prefers doing things fully or not at all
suspects removing his pyramid is causing him to need more sleep
frustrated and suspects it's not paranoia but a real platform issue affecting him specifically
feels overwhelmed but committed to tackling it today

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was going to pick up my microphone today but just woke up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My computer is not cooling itself, but the sound is really good.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm really high right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working until around 2 AM and woke up at 10 AM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like I took my period away from myself the other day because I had to move things out of the way.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It doesn't take much time to get the mattress out of the way, but it takes more time to move the pyramid.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm really hurt right now, but I think it's worth it to take the pyramid out of the way.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Since I got rid of the pyramid, I need more extra sleep, like 12 hours yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I had the pyramid, I was getting around six hours of sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel a little bit overwhelmed with so much organization.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Organizing my room feels like trying to run through a wall and never quite getting there.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The great goal for organizing my room is tackling the shelves.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to organize the deck, the car, and digital stuff before selling the car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Someone gave me a request after two green screen videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can do green screen panoramas or visions in the background, whatever people want.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't care about doing incomplete versions of things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can recreate historical locations like 1859 Boulder or ghost towns in Colorado.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have traced walls of cities in Europe and can create panoramas of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If I don't get a request, I'll stand on top of the Great Pyramid of Giza in Boulder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had issues uploading a video last time, with it getting stuck at processing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might email large files to my mom instead of uploading them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My neighbor's internet is fast, but mine is slow even when hardwired.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can't comment on YouTube comments and don't want people calling me paranoid.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today I'm going to organize my house because I need to sell my car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to organize my papers, including car documents, before selling the car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to scan and share all my papers for the car.
